name: Pack Of 12 – Miglior Cat Food Game Alutray – 100g
shortDescription: Formula designed to guarantee the key nutrients required for the well-being of your cat. Vitamin E with antioxidant action and a recipe rich in meat to help keep muscle mass toned.
description: COMPOSITION : Meat and animal derivatives 50% (game 5%), minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 80%, Crude protein 11%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude fat 4%, Crude ash 1.8%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 23.7 mg, Zinc (Zinc sulphate monohydrate) 2.1 mg, Copper (Copper sulphate pentahydrate) 2.0 mg, Manganese (Manganous sulphate monohydrate) 2.1 mg, Iodine (Potassium iodide) 0.4 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place.

tags.name: Bulk Cat Food & Bulk Dog Food
